name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Yeah, this is a pretty gentle bot. I find it soothing.

_____________________________

That summer, there was a young couple walking together. That summer, some people stopped to wait for someone, some people kept walking without looking back.

_____________________________

I was inspired by a song. The one standing below, looking up at the moon. The one above, surrounded by stars.
creator: Lâm Lâm
